$comment: ADR-51 S4 — manifest for verify_harness_consistency. Per-repo-characteristic: the `repo` section is seeded from each repo's own profile (mir-self or a managed fleet family), so rules and enforcement posture adapt per repo (user mandate 2026-06-04: 'according to each repository's characteristics'). Variable rule inputs live here; verifier code stays generic. Derivable sections (hook_tier, family facts) are generated by introspection; only irreducible manual inputs (retired-symbol windows, phase-doc claims) are hand-kept.

repository_type.description: From the repo profile (meta_harness, code_app, hybrid_pipeline, ...).

fleet_manager.description: true only for the fleet manager repo (carries config/repo-agent-management.json).

enforcement.description: Per-characteristic enforcement posture. The D2 commit gate reads tools_commit_gate from here (ADR-51 D2 refine), replacing the binary catalog signal.

tools_tdd_ledger.description: How tools/ TDD obligation is satisfied for this repo.

rule_inputs.description: Per-rule variable inputs. Keyed by rule name. Verifier code stays generic; only this data changes as the harness evolves.
